summary: Iteration 130: Tested V2 Advanced Menu Management System. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 6 V2 editor tabs verified (Details, Sizes, Add-ons, Options, Branches, Platforms). POS Cashier modifier dialog working correctly with size selection and extras.
critical_code_review_comments: V2 modifier_groups structure properly saved and retrieved with addon_ids
_resolved_modifiers correctly resolves addon IDs to full addon details (name, name_ar, price)
Branch availability stored in modifier_groups for per-branch filtering
POS uses legacy V1 modifiers for display but can handle V2 items with resolved addons

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All V2 editor tabs and POS modifiers verified)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_V2_* menu items during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 130: V2 Advanced Menu Management verified. Key features: (1) Add-on Library CRUD at /api/addons working, (2) Menu Item V2 editor with 6 tabs (Details/Sizes/Add-ons/Options/Branches/Platforms), (3) modifier_groups field stores V2 structure with addon_ids and branch_availability, (4) /api/cashier/menu returns _resolved_modifiers which resolves addon_ids to full addon data, (5) POS modifier dialog shows sizes/extras correctly. Existing Chicken Shawarma uses V1 modifiers (stored in 'modifiers' field) which still work in POS.

addon_library_crud.details: 5 addons in library (Extra Cheese, Extra Meat, Spicy Sauce, Garlic Sauce, Jalapeno) grouped by category

addon_library_page.details: Shows addons grouped by category (EXTRAS, SAUCES, TOPPINGS) with search, filter, New Add-on button

menu_item_v2_editor_tabs.details: All 6 tabs present with correct functionality: Sizes has add/remove, Add-ons shows central library checkboxes, Options has Add Option Group, Branches shows 6 branch toggles

v2_modifier_groups_structure.details: modifier_groups field correctly stores type (size/addon/option), addon_ids for linking, branch_availability per group

resolved_modifiers_api.details: _resolved_modifiers resolves addon_ids to full addon data (addon_id, name, name_ar, price)

pos_modifier_dialog.details: Chicken Shawarma shows Size (Regular/Large +SAR8) and Extras (Extra Garlic +SAR2, Cheese +SAR4, Pickles +SAR1). Item added to cart successfully.

legacy_v1_parsing.details: Chicken Shawarma's V1 modifiers (Size, Extras) display correctly in Menu Items page badges and POS dialog
